title: Recreate develop to main release PR for reviewability
description: Close blocked PR #239 and recreate an equivalent develop-to-main release PR under Derek so Ryan can review under branch protection rules. Preserve title/body/context and verify checks on the replacement PR.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Closed blocked release PR #239 and opened replacement PR #244 preserving the same develop-to-main release context. Replacement PR: https://github.com/AnthusAI/Plexus/pull/244. Next: monitor CI and leave task open until the PR lands.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Replacement release PR #244 is open and CI is green. Fresh checks passing: CodeQL actions/python/javascript-typescript, Snyk, Version Sync, Dashboard Storybook Tests, Dashboard Unit Tests, Python Tests 3.11, and Python Tests 3.12. Task remains in_progress until PR #244 is approved and merged.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Replacement PR #244 landed in main at merge commit 1385827508adfc22b2a43104a8e12e6a57c32df5. Original blocked PR #239 was closed, equivalent develop-to-main PR was recreated under Derek, CI passed, and branch protection review path was restored.
